source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

1.description: Quincy's arrows bounce to up to 3 different targets.

2.description: Base attack bounces to up to 4 targets.

3.description: Rapid Shot: Triple attack speed for a short time.

5.description: Uses his sharp eyesight to shoot Camo Bloons.

8.description: Arrows do triple damage to MOAB-Class Bloons.

9.description: Base attack bounces to up to 6 targets.

10.description: Storm of Arrows: Covers a large area in a deadly rain of arrows.

12.description: Each arrow gets more popping power.

13.description: Small range increase and Rapid Shot lasts longer.

14.description: Arrows do quad damage to MOAB-Class Bloons.

15.description: Rapid Shot becomes x4 attack speed and cooldown is reduced.

17.description: Arrows last 25% longer. Fires exploding arrows every 2nd shot.

18.description: Quincy attacks faster and Storm of Arrows is greatly enhanced.

19.description: Shoots 3 arrows at a time, and each arrow gets even more popping power.

20.description: Quincy attacks even faster. Storm of Arrows deals more damage per arrow and fires even more arrows.
